items.title: Bondi Beach shooting accused faces court for the first time
items.dek: The 24-year-old faces 59 charges, including 15 counts of murder and one of committing a terrorist attack.

items.title: Female Israeli soldiers rescued after being chased by ultra-Orthodox men
items.dek: The two women were helped by police after being forced to run from a mob in the city of Bnei Brak.
items.body: The two women were helped by police after being forced to run from a mob in the city of Bnei Brak.
